abilities.name: Calm
abilities.desc: Calm an enemy, disarming their melee and ranged weapons for 6 seconds.If your target is an Undead or Demon, they are also unable to attack or move for 6 seconds. Enemies that are immune to silence effects cannot be affected by this.

abilities.name: Vow of the Valkyr
abilities.desc: Auto attacks generate 1 Solar Power and deal 10% increased damage.Fulfillment: Melee ability damage triggers an auto attack with each weapon.Only 1 Vow can be active at a time.

abilities.name: Gift of the Sun
abilities.desc: Increases your critical strike chance with Holy spells and abilities by 50% on enemies above 80% health.

abilities.name: Holy Form
abilities.desc: Ascend into a holy form, increasing your healing done by 10%, increasing your Holy critical strike chance by 5%, and reducing your threat generated by -50%.

abilities.name: Blessed Hammer
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Solar Invocation spells by -10 sec.

abilities.name: Burn The Heretics
abilities.desc: Increases your damage and healing by 10% against targets below 35% health.Additionally, when Scorch Marks are consumed you now gain 10% increased Magic damage for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Light The Way
abilities.desc: Healing done by Shine or Illumination now increases the targets movement speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Touch of Light
abilities.desc: Enemies struck by Blessing of Absolution now deal -20% reduced damage for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: March of the Valkyr
abilities.desc: Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, your chance to parry is increased by 5%.

abilities.name: Impartial
abilities.desc: Increases your Strength and maximum mana by 5% and your expertise by 5.

abilities.name: Valkyr's Grip
abilities.desc: Increases your off-hand Weapon Damage dealt by 20% and reduces the duration of disarm effects by -15%.

abilities.name: The Coming Dawn
abilities.desc: While Dawn is active, damage dealt by Radiant Flame now reduces the cooldown of Dawnfall and Solar Concord by -1 sec.

abilities.name: Devotee
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of your Devotions by 20%.

abilities.name: Twilight
abilities.desc: Applying Vow of the Eclipse now blinds enemies struck, increasing their chance to miss their next attack by -10% for 6 seconds, stacking 5 times. Does not work on bosses.In addition, increases the effectiveness of the Fulfillment effect of Vow of the Eclipse by 100%.

abilities.name: Valkyrie's Watch
abilities.desc: Damage that would take you below 35% health and damage taken while below 35% health is reduced by 25%.

abilities.name: Holy Conquest
abilities.desc: Reduces the mana cost of Paragon, Chosen of the Light, and Judgement Day by -50%.

abilities.name: Stalwart
abilities.desc: Melee critical strikes against you prevent you from being critically struck again for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Protector of the Flame
abilities.desc: Avoiding an attack now also deals 648% fire SP + 3% AP Fire damage to the attacker.Can only occur once per sec.

abilities.name: Trial of Valor
abilities.desc: Fulfilling a Vow now reduces the cooldown of Horusath Blast by -2 sec.

abilities.name: Duality of Light
abilities.desc: While in Sunset, your Holy damage dealt grants Twin Flame.Twin Flames (Fire)Your next Rapture within 15 seconds strikes again for 8% of the damage dealt, stacking 10 times.While in Sunrise, your Fire damage dealt grants Sun PowerSun Power (Holy)Your next Horusath Blast within 15 seconds strikes again for 8% of the damage dealt, stacking 10 times.

abilities.name: Wrath of God
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Sunflare and Dawnsear by 3% and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 50%.

abilities.name: Warmth
abilities.desc: Direct healing now increases the target's health by 300 for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Stand Against Darkness
abilities.desc: During the day you now deal -10% more Holy damage and take -10% reduced periodic damage.

abilities.name: Photosynthetic
abilities.desc: Increases your spell haste by 3%, plus an additional 1% during the day.

abilities.name: Rapture
abilities.desc: Call down a streak of sun light to smite your target, dealing 111 + 200% fire SP Fire damage to them and nearby enemies, piercing all immunities, but dealing less damage with each enemy struck.

abilities.name: Glare
abilities.desc: Flash powerful light that deals 20 + 27.41% SP Holy damage and stuns enemies within 8 yds for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Dawnbreak
abilities.desc: Radiate holy light from your shield on enemies in front of you, dealing 23 + 25% SP + 10% AP Holyfire Damage, scaling with your block value.

abilities.name: A Pious Life
abilities.desc: Increases the damage of Horusath Blast and Rapture by 15%.

abilities.name: Suncharged
abilities.desc: Your Judgement Day now applies Suncharged to the target every 1 sec, stacking 10 times.At the end of the duration, or when Judgement Day ends, the enemy takes 477 + 30% AP + 50% holy SP Holy damage, increased for each stack on the target.

abilities.name: Champion's Arrival
abilities.desc: Increases the duration of Champion of the Sun and Chains of Light by 5 sec.

abilities.name: Gleaming Vigil
abilities.desc: Reduces your Physical damage taken by -5%, plus an additional 5% while above 80% health.

abilities.name: Grace
abilities.desc: Increases your chance to dodge by 5%.

abilities.name: Heat Death
abilities.desc: Your Solar Eclipse now reduces the enemies chance to hit by -3% for 15 sec.

abilities.name: Sunwalker
abilities.desc: Dealing melee damage now generates a stack of Sunwalker.SunwalkerReduces the cast time and mana cost of your next Shine by -20% for 30 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Odyn's Vanguard
abilities.desc: Melee attacks now have a 20% chance to reset the cooldown of Glorious Execution.

abilities.name: Justice
abilities.desc: Spin and strike with both weapons dealing 40% Weapon Damage plus 6 + 20% fire SP to up to 5 enemies within 5 yds.Your main-hand strike will deal Fire damage and your off-hand strike will deal Physical damage.

abilities.name: Radiant Halberd
abilities.desc: Direct Physical damage dealt now reduces the cooldown of Champion of the Sun by -1 sec.

abilities.name: Light's Blessing
abilities.desc: Casting Sunslam now reduces the cooldown of Pendant of the Sun by -10 sec.

abilities.name: Divine Retribution
abilities.desc: Accumulates 25% of your damage dealt to on the target and unleashes it after 8 seconds, damaging enemies within 10 yds as Holy damage.

abilities.name: Blessed Bulwark
abilities.desc: Avoiding an attack now has a 25% chance to regenerate 5% of your base mana.

abilities.name: Gleaming Armor
abilities.desc: Reduces your spell damage taken by -5%, plus an additional -5% while above 80% health.

abilities.name: Solar Nova
abilities.desc: Emit a powerful holy light in an 8 yd radius, dealing 93 + 50% holy SP + 5.06% AP Holy damage to all nearby enemies. Reduces the cooldown of your Solar Invocation spells by -1 sec for each target struck.This ability is guaranteed to critically strike against Undead or Demons.

abilities.name: Sun Strider
abilities.desc: Critical strikes with Gavels or Dawnbreak now increases the healing of your next Illumination within 20 seconds by 15%, stacking up to 3 times.Consuming the stacks increases your critical block chance and movement speed by 10% for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Adjudicator
abilities.desc: Your Justicar's Wrath now deals an additional 50% of its damage dealt to the target and enemies around them, healing you for 10% of the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Together In Conquest
abilities.desc: Your Solar Invocation spells now causes your Illumination to heal an additional nearby ally at 70% effectiveness for 10 seconds.In addition, Illumination now reduces the cooldown of Solar Invocation spells by -1 sec.

abilities.name: Sacred Vessel
abilities.desc: Expending Angelic Presence increases your critical strike chance and healing by 1% for 20 seconds, stacking up to 10 times.Additional applications do not refresh the duration.

abilities.name: Scroll of Hope
abilities.desc: Read from a scroll of hope, reducing Magic damage taken by party and raid members within 15 yds by -30% for 10 seconds.If any ally falls below 35% of their maximum health while this is active they are instantly healed once for 15% of their maximum health.

abilities.name: Bastion of Hope
abilities.desc: Critical strikes now bless you, regenerating 41 + 15% SP mana and increasing all of your primary stats by 10% for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Paying The Tithe
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Dawnbreak by 10% and your Seraphic Bulwark now lasts for 2 additional blocks.

abilities.name: The Chosen
abilities.desc: Your Illumination now shields you for 30% of the amount healed.

abilities.name: Judgement
abilities.desc: Increases the critical damage of Gavels by 15% and they are now guaranteed to critically strike against Undead enemies.

abilities.name: Hammer of Kings
abilities.desc: Become anointed by the light, summoning a blessed hammer that encircles you dealing 43 + 12% AP + 22% holy SP Holyfire Damage to nearby enemies every 3 sec for 12 seconds.

abilities.name: Blessing of Purity
abilities.desc: Protect a Blessed ally, making them immune to all damage for 4 seconds but reducing their damage and healing done by -25%.

abilities.name: Sanctified
abilities.desc: Healing a target affected by Bless refunds 25% of the mana cost of the spell.

abilities.name: Blessing of Retribution
abilities.desc: Guard a Blessed ally, deflecting the next harmful spell cast on them within 1 minute.

abilities.name: Sun Disc
abilities.desc: You now emit an aura that causes all nearby allies to receive 6% increased healing. Does not stack with similar effects.In addition, the healing done by Illumination is increased by 20%.

abilities.name: Radiance
abilities.desc: Every 2 sec you burst with light, healing nearby allies for 36 + 20% SP + 10% AP and damaging nearby enemies for 37 + 40% SP + 15% AP. Lasts 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Light of the Sun
abilities.desc: Parrying an attack now restores 3% of your maximum health and increases your chance to parry the next attack by 30%.

abilities.name: Radiant Power
abilities.desc: Each stack of Sunwalker now increases the critical strike chance of Shine by 3%.

abilities.name: Flames of the Father
abilities.desc: Your Fire damage dealt is increased by 10% against Burning targets.

abilities.name: Improved Radiant Cascade
abilities.desc: Increases the healing done and reduces the mana cost of Radiant Cascade by -15%.

abilities.name: Unbreakable Focus
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Gavels and Horusath Blast by -20%.

abilities.name: New Day
abilities.desc: Start anew, reseting the cooldown of Paragon, Chosen of the Light, and Judgement Day.

abilities.name: Guiding Glow
abilities.desc: Allows Dawn to affect 3 additional casts.

abilities.name: Divine Vision
abilities.desc: Increases your Holy damage and healing done by 4%.

abilities.name: Glaring Rays
abilities.desc: Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3% and your spell haste by an additional 3%.Does not stack with similar effects.

abilities.name: Solar Eclipse
abilities.desc: Dawnbreak now unleashes a burst of holy energy after a 1 seconds delay, dealing 22 + 12.5% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Heat Wave
abilities.desc: Healing with Illumination and Shine now additionally heals the target's nearby allies for 10% of the value.

abilities.name: Solar Invocation: Resplendence
abilities.desc: Invoke the grace of An'she for 8 seconds, causing your llluminations to be instant cast and guaranteed to critically strike, but cost 100% more mana.

abilities.name: Sun Down
abilities.desc: Bring the wrath of the sun down upon an enemy after 2 seconds, dealing 1180 + 130% SP Holyflame Damage and scorching the earth beneath them for 9 seconds. While inside, enemies are struck by a Solar Flare every 3 sec and take 15% increased damage from Rapture and Horusath Blast.Solar Flare (Damage)Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Angelic
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Illumination by 0.25 sec.

abilities.name: Knight of Dawn
abilities.desc: Your Glorious Execution now has a 20% chance to strike 1 additional time.

abilities.name: Horusath Blast
abilities.desc: Blast an enemy with the power of the sun, dealing 73 + 100% holy SP Holy damage and reducing their attack power by 235 for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Solar Might
abilities.desc: Increases your Strength and Intellect by 5%.

abilities.name: Seraphic Bulwark
abilities.desc: 2 Charges, 25 sec rechargeRaise your blessed shield, increasing your block value by 100%. Lasts for 5 blocks or 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Sunburn
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Rapture by -0.5 sec.

abilities.name: Grace
abilities.desc: Increases the spell damage bonus of Dawnsear by 20% and Sunflare by 10%.

abilities.name: Sun Shield
abilities.desc: Reduces your chance to be hit by spells by -3%.

abilities.name: Solar Invocation: Revelation
abilities.desc: Invoke An'she to root an enemy for 4 seconds with holy shackles or heal an ally for 10% maximum health and increase their movement speed by 50% for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Nysoni's Blessing
abilities.desc: Dawn will now provide an additional effect based on your specialization.

abilities.name: An'she's Guidance
abilities.desc: Increases your Holy critical strike chance by 2% and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 50%.

abilities.name: Blessing of Triumph
abilities.desc: Redeem a Blessed ally for 20 seconds, granting 25% increased haste and 10% increased damage.If the ally falls below 35% maximum health they are healed for 10% of their direct damage dealt for the remaining duration.

abilities.name: Hope
abilities.desc: Your critical heals now reduce the cooldown of Solar Invocation spells by -1 sec.Can occur only once per sec.

abilities.name: Savior
abilities.desc: Increases your healing on targets below 20% health by 30%.

abilities.name: Blessing of Absolution
abilities.desc: Empower a Blessed ally to unleash a burst of holy energy in front of them, dealing 32 + 150% healing Holy damage enemies in a 10 yd frontal cone and generating additional threat.

abilities.name: Burning Cascade
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time and mana cost of Dawnsear and Sunflare by -10%.

abilities.name: Enveloped in Light
abilities.desc: Increases your armor contribution from mail and plate items by 10% and reduces Shadow damage taken by -3%.

abilities.name: Sun's Hope
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Solar Flares now grants you 1 Solar Power and increase the targets chance to be critically struck by spells by 3% for 8 seconds.Solar Flare (Damage)Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Solar Conduit
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Dawnsear by -20% while Dawn is active.

abilities.name: Purgation
abilities.desc: Dealing damage with Radiant Flame now increases the target's Holy and Fire damage taken from you by 1% for 8 seconds, stacking 8 times.

abilities.name: Dawn's Arrival
abilities.desc: Casting Dawnbreak now has a 40% chance to reset the cooldown of Gavels and causes the next one to not incur a cooldown.

abilities.name: Justicar's Wrath
abilities.desc: Bring holy wrath down upon an enemy, dealing 508 + 55% SP + 25% AP High Threat Holy damage and increasing the target's spell damage taken by 10% for 15 seconds.

abilities.name: Solar Empowerment
abilities.desc: Fulfilling your Vow now unleashes a chain of light at your target, dealing 91 + 23% holy SP + 10% AP Holy damage and then bouncing to up to 5 additional enemies, dealing reduced damage with each strike.

abilities.name: Champion of the Sun
abilities.desc: Become a champion of An'she, causing your melee auto attacks to deal an additional 50% of the damage dealt as Holy damage. Lasts 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Herald of Purity
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Justice now has an 8% chance to reset its own cooldown.

abilities.name: Circle of Valor
abilities.desc: Place a 10 yd holy circle at target location for 15 seconds. Allies that stand inside of it will divert 30% of all damage taken to the caster, and will be healed for 50 + 42.5% SP + 12.5% AP every 2 sec.

abilities.name: Solar Concord
abilities.desc: Resets the cooldown of Horusath Blast while in Sunrise and Rapture while in Sunset and causes their damage dealt to launch a Solar Flare. Lasts 15 seconds.Solar Flare (Damage)Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Spears of Glory
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Radiant Flame now has an 15% chance to grant you Spears of Glory.Spears of GloryYour next Dawnsear within 10 seconds is instant cast and deals 25% increased damage.

abilities.name: Holy Fervor
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Sunrise and Sunset by 20%.

abilities.name: Adjudication
abilities.desc: Casting Rapture now causes your next Dawnsear within 10 seconds to strike your target twice and launch a Solar Flare at the target.Solar Flare (Damage)Deals 137 + 26% SP Holyflame Damage and reduces the target's chance to hit by -3% for 10 seconds.

abilities.name: Sunwell
abilities.desc: Become an embodiment of the sun for 30 seconds that periodically dispels fear, sleep, and charm effects every 3 sec from allies within 40 yds.

abilities.name: Sun Gate
abilities.desc: Shift 25 yds forward at light speed, removing all root effects.This leaves behind a Sun Gate for 15 seconds that allies can interact with to blink themselves the same distance forward. Allies can only use Sun Gate every 90 seconds.

abilities.name: Blessed Armor
abilities.desc: Increases your spell power by 1 for every 125 Armor you have.

abilities.name: Faith
abilities.desc: Direct healing done now increases the target's Armor by 10% for 20 seconds.

abilities.name: Sunbeams
abilities.desc: Reduces the cast time of Radiant Cascade by -15%.

abilities.name: Empowered Holy Form
abilities.desc: Doubles the effectiveness of your Holy Form.

abilities.name: Radiant Flame
abilities.desc: Launch radiant spheres at an enemy each dealing 31 + 20.69% SP Holyflame Damage, repeating every 1 sec for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Glorious Defender
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Gavels by 25%.

abilities.name: Blessed Magic
abilities.desc: Casting Horusath Blast now resets the cooldown of Glorious Execution.

abilities.name: Sun Stride
abilities.desc: Rush forward at a high speed for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Dawnsear
abilities.desc: Blast an enemy with burning light, dealing 88 + 100% fire SP Fire damage.

abilities.name: Bless
abilities.desc: Bless an ally, restoring 5% of their maximum health every 10 sec for 5 minutes.Can only affect 1 ally at a time.

abilities.name: Glorious Execution
abilities.desc: Strike with both weapons dealing Weapon Damage plus 8 Physical damage and regenerate mana equal to 5% of the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Hot Spot
abilities.desc: Casting Daybreak now causes your next 2 Shines within 10 seconds to have a -25% reduced cast time.

abilities.name: Fanaticism
abilities.desc: Increases the effectiveness of Gavels and Horusath Blast and reduces their mana cost by -20%.

abilities.name: Valkyr's Calling
abilities.desc: Target an enemy and leap into the air, becoming immune to all physical attacks and spells for 2 seconds. At the end of the duration, you charge back down, dealing 428 + 100% AP + 22.5% SP Holy damage to all enemies within 8 yds.

abilities.name: Blessed One
abilities.desc: Increases your chance to block by 5% and reduces the duration of movement slowing effects by -20%.

abilities.name: Radiant Marks
abilities.desc: Reduces the channel time of Sunslam by 1 sec.

abilities.name: Solar Prayer
abilities.desc: Recite a solar prayer, instantly healing you for 25% of your maximum health plus an additional 100 + 100% SP, scaling with spell power.Usable while stunned.

abilities.name: Fervor of the Sun
abilities.desc: Fulfilling a Vow now increases the damage of your Sunslam by 10% for 1 minute, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Pendant of the Sun
abilities.desc: Activate your pendant of the sun, refreshing the duration and all charges of Dawn.

abilities.name: Sunsworn
abilities.desc: Increases your Physical damage dealt by 6% and auto attacks now have a 10% chance to restore 3% of your maximum mana.

abilities.name: Solar Invocation: Conquest
abilities.desc: Invoke the spirit of An'she to instantly generate 10 Solar Power and refunds 10% of your maximum mana.

abilities.name: Exorcism
abilities.desc: Sanctify now dispels 1 additional effect.

abilities.name: Sunslam
abilities.desc: Slam an enemy every 1 sec with the might of the sun, dealing 28 + 15.94% AP Holy damage and stunning them for 1 seconds. Lasts 4 seconds.Only usable while Dawn is active. Usable while moving.

abilities.name: Daybreak
abilities.desc: Make a prayer, healing an ally for 155 + 59.5% healing.

abilities.name: Vindicator
abilities.desc: Your Glorious Execution now ignores -10% of the target's armor while Vow of the Valkyr is active.

abilities.name: Hope
abilities.desc: When the absorption shield from The Chosen is depleted, it explodes for 80 + 25% AP + 45% holy SP Holy damage, split between enemies within 8 yds.

abilities.name: Dawnguard
abilities.desc: Fulfilling a Vow now increases your block chance by 2% for 15 seconds, stacking 5 times.

abilities.name: Shining Shield
abilities.desc: Activating Dawn now grants Shining Shield for 8 seconds.Shining ShieldIncreases your Armor contribution from your shield by 50%.

abilities.name: Divine Right
abilities.desc: Increases your chance to critically strike and to parry attacks by 2% and your spell hit chance by 5%.

abilities.name: Valiance
abilities.desc: Increases your melee attack speed by 15% and your first auto attack on a target hits twice.

abilities.name: Luminary Mendicant
abilities.desc: Increases the mana restored by Vow of Grace by 100%.

abilities.name: Swift Justice
abilities.desc: Increases your haste by 3%.

abilities.name: Moment of Triumph
abilities.desc: Horusath Blast or Rapture now have a 20% chance to not incur a cooldown on cast.

abilities.name: Censure
abilities.desc: Dealing direct damage to an enemy affected by Chains of Light will now cause it to chain to a nearby enemy. Can only occur once per sec.

abilities.name: Sintorcher
abilities.desc: Increases your damage and healing done by 3% and your critical strike chance against Undead by 2%.

abilities.name: Pure Light
abilities.desc: While above 80% health you now deal 10% increased damage and healing.

abilities.name: Solar Guardian
abilities.desc: Reduces the duration of stun effects on you by -20%.

abilities.name: Solar Priest
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Solar Invigoration by -30 sec.In addition, whenever allies effectively heal with Shine they now cast Illumination. Can only occur once every 6 sec.Illumination (Rank 11)Illuminate an ally, healing them for 1373 + 68% healing.

abilities.name: Gleaming Light
abilities.desc: Increases healing of Illumination and Daybreak by 10%.

abilities.name: Mercy
abilities.desc: Grant mercy to an ally, abolishing 2 disease effects, repeating every 3 sec for 12 seconds.

abilities.name: Ancient Rites
abilities.desc: Increases your Intellect by 2% and causes you to regenerate mana equal to 1% of your maximum mana every 20 sec.

abilities.name: Cultivate Divinity
abilities.desc: Effectively healing with Radiant Cascade has a 20% chance to increase the healing of your next Illumination by 20%. Effectively healing with Illumination has a 40% chance to increase the healing of your next Radiant Cascade by 20%.

abilities.name: Solar Invigoration
abilities.desc: For 15 seconds, your allies take 20% increased healing and their direct damage dealt now causes them to cast Shine. Can only occur once every 2 sec.Shine (Rank 8)Shine holy light upon an ally, healing for 511 + 29.47% SP.

abilities.name: Lead Me Not Astray
abilities.desc: Doubles the healing done by Bless.

abilities.name: Learning Light
abilities.desc: Entering Sunset or Sunrise increases your spell haste by 20%. Lasts for 10 seconds or 3 casts.

abilities.name: Soul of Light
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of An'she's Blessing by -60 sec.

abilities.name: Scorch Marks
abilities.desc: Casting Dawnsear and Sunflare now have a 40% chance to grant Scorch Marks for 10 seconds.Scorch MarksYour next Radiant Flame has no mana cost, ticks -50% faster, and its duration is reduced by -50%.

abilities.name: Harsh Lessons
abilities.desc: Casting Dawn now grants Scorch Marks.Scorch MarksYour next Radiant Flame has no mana cost, ticks -50% faster, and its duration is reduced by -50%.

abilities.name: Burning Heat
abilities.desc: Casting Sunflare now has a 30% chance to transform your next Sunflare into Sun Ray.Casting Horusath Blast is now guaranteed to transform your next Sunflare into Sun Ray.Sun RayShine the light of the sun on an enemy, dealing 773 + 100% holy SP Holy Damage and granting you Scorch Marks.Scorch MarksYour next Radiant Flame has no mana cost, ticks -50% faster, and its duration is reduced by -50%.

abilities.name: Solar Champion
abilities.desc: Increases the range of your Piety spells by 20% and reduces the threat generated by them by -20%.

abilities.name: City of Light / Radiant Fury
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Radiant Flame now restores 3% of your missing health and mana.

abilities.name: Lights of Absolution / Flames of Absolution
abilities.desc: Damage dealt by Horusath Blast now grants you Light of Absolution for 10 seconds.Lights of AbsolutionDamage dealt by Solar Flares now restores 2% missing health, Energy, Focus, Runic Power, and Rage to allies within 40 yds. Can only occur once every 0.5 sec.

abilities.name: Devoted to the Light / Devoted to the Sun
abilities.desc: Removes the cost of your Solar Invocation spells and they now generate 5% of your missing mana when cast.

abilities.name: Fortuitous / Angelic Light
abilities.desc: Removes the cast time of Glare while above 80% health.

abilities.name: Zealous  / Hegemony
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Radiance by -30 sec, but reduces its duration by -4 sec.

abilities.name: Final Vows / Taking Vows
abilities.desc: Fulfilling your Vow of Grace now also reduces the cooldown of the triggered ability by 10%.

abilities.name: Pure Heart / Lightward
abilities.desc: Removes the damage penalty provided by Blessing of Purity.

abilities.name: Sun Strength / Everglow
abilities.desc: Radiant Cascade is now guaranteed to critically strike on allies affected by Bless.

abilities.name: Blazing Chariot / Gateway to Heaven
abilities.desc: Increases the healing and damage of Radiance by 125%.

abilities.name: Blightbreaker / Harmonious Bells
abilities.desc: Increases the tick rate of Mercy by -50%, but increases its mana cost by 100%.

abilities.name: It's Always Sunny / Atone, Or Else
abilities.desc: Activating Dawn now reduces the cooldowns of Radiance, Valkyr's Calling, and Sunslam by 10%.

abilities.name: Arbiter of Grace / Arbiter of Light
abilities.desc: While Vow of Grace is active, your Glorious Execution now regenerates an additional 15% mana equal to the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Judgement of the Valkyrie / Leap of the Valkyrie
abilities.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Judgement Day by -15 sec.

abilities.name: By The Light / Last Call
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Valkyr's Calling by 50%.

abilities.name: Sun Warrior's Guidance / The Chosen King
abilities.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Gavels and Dawnbreak by 5%.

abilities.name: Sunflare Aegis / Blessing of Kings
abilities.desc: Blocking attacks now has a 30% chance to grant you Hammer of Kings for 4 sec. If Hammer of Kings is already active, you increase the duration by 4 sec.Hammer of KingsBecome anointed by the light, summoning a blessed hammer that encircles you dealing 43 + 12% AP + 22% holy SP Holyfire Damage to nearby enemies every 3 sec for 12 seconds.
